不过有一点我不满的是，更新太慢了。
求作者大大，速更 速更，因为根本不够看[大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772089576,"group_id":"7609245144633576510","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+dfGuLZMTsT8Xd0sGonv99bgM16d79lGkS0mCh8GpV0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4461141799735098","user_name":"溪山的马泰·尚恩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4461141799735098","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609245144633576510","book_info":{"abstract":"【金手指】+【女主十八号】
当自己穿越成龙珠里最悲剧的男人，雅木茶时，人都麻了。
根据记忆这个时间段是一年之后就要去面对人造人。
雅木茶在想，难道要成为第一个炮灰，然后，后面慢慢的退出Z战士的名额吗？
就在这时，百炼成钢的系统降临，此后雅木茶有了小目标，我一定要成为第七宇宙比鲁斯之下第一人。
之后的大目标，当然是以后再算了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/23f70047daa9b6ef186debe35c587b48~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一只可爱的小肥辉","author_id":"","book_id":"7609245144633576510","book_name":"龙珠：茶神崛起","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":376,"name":"龙珠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376&name=龙珠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609897498026443326","read_count":"123","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"150007"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"55","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,龙珠,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/23f70047daa9b6ef186debe35c587b48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365925&x-signature=ise%2FacquH%2F1u5%2FQDHziA804gZWI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2815190543118014","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222018458AC874F89BFE2E4D4079"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读33分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count"
